summary.zh: 让超出容器的信息连续滚动，并在悬停或聚焦时暂停。
summary.en: Continuously scroll overflowing content and pause it on hover or focus.

definition.zh: 文字或内容持续循环滚动。
definition.en: A content track translates continuously and wraps to create an uninterrupted scrolling strip.

description.zh: 控制完整循环的节奏；持续动态需要支持暂停并保持低干扰。
description.en: Controls the rhythm of one full cycle; continuous motion should stay pausable and low-distraction.

description.zh: 悬停或聚焦时暂停滚动。
description.en: Pauses motion on hover or focus.

purpose.zh: 在有限空间内连续展示超长信息流，并提供暂停阅读的能力。
purpose.en: Present an overlong information stream in limited space while allowing users to pause and read.

frequency.zh: 适合低频品牌、合作方或实时状态带；正文信息保持静态可访问。
frequency.en: Use sparingly for brands, partners, or live status strips while keeping core text statically accessible.

trigger.zh: 由内容溢出且组件处于播放状态触发，内容不足一屏时保持静止。
trigger.en: Run only when content overflows and playback is active, remaining still when content fits.

enterExit.zh: 副本无缝衔接形成连续轨道，停止时落在完整可读的位置。
enterExit.en: Join duplicated content into a seamless track and stop at a fully readable position.

interruptibility.zh: 悬停、聚焦或页面隐藏时暂停当前位置，恢复后继续。
interruptibility.en: Pause at the current position on hover, focus, or page hide, and continue on resume.

gestureRules.zh: 用户可通过悬停、聚焦和按钮暂停；轨道内容的键盘顺序只保留一份。
gestureRules.en: Let users pause through hover, focus, and a control while keeping one keyboard-accessible copy of track content.

reducedMotion.zh: 停止滚动并换行或展示可横向浏览的静态列表。
reducedMotion.en: Stop scrolling and wrap content or provide a statically browsable horizontal list.

reviewNotes.zh: 隐藏重复副本，避免屏幕阅读器重复朗读。
reviewNotes.en: Hide duplicate copies from screen readers.

reviewNotes.zh: 速度按文本长度和阅读时间校准。
reviewNotes.en: Calibrate speed against text length and reading time.
